title: Fermented Velvety Biryani Masala Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix Croatian dish featuring fermented biryani masala, air-fried for a velvety texture and low fodmap-friendly option.

ingredients.name: Fermented Paneer Cubes or Tofu Cubes
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality, low-sodium products if necessary

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and add the fermented biryani masala powder.
Add extra virgin olive oil for flavoring. Stir continuously until it forms a velvety sauce.
Gradually fold in almond slivers or hazelnut pieces, if using, stirring well to distribute evenly across the surface of the mixture.

Once the mixture starts to clump and form a thicker consistency without sticking too much, add fermented paneer cubes or tofu cubes. Stir gently but thoroughly so all ingredients are coated with the masala sauce.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes until the cheese cubes start to melt slightly and become crisp on top.
Remove from heat immediately after serving.
